author: Danny Willow Liu
name: 11L GPTQ-lite + Self-Distillation TTT
blurb: PR #374 SOTA stack (11L XSA4, Tight SWA, Partial RoPE 16/64, LN Scale, Late QAT, Value Embedding, EMA) plus two novel post-training optimizations: (1) GPTQ-lite per-layer optimal clip percentile search during int6 quantization, (2) Self-distillation TTT with KL divergence from frozen teacher. FA3 Hopper attention. Int6 per-row + zstd-22. 8xH100 SXM.
